---
title: "Syllabus"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    output-file: syllabus-handout.pdf
  docx:
    output-file: syllabus-handout.docx

---

::: callout-note
This is the syllabus for the **Spring 2026** offering of Epi 204.
All details are subject to change during the quarter;
the authoritative, continuously-updated version is posted on
[Canvas](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/courses/1077308).
:::

+--------------+:------------------------------------:+---------------:+
| **EPI 204**  | **Quantitative Epidemiology III**    | **Ezra         |
|              |                                      | Morrison**     |
| **Spring     | **Statistical Models**               |                |
| 2026**       |                                      | **March 31,    |
|              |                                      | 2026**         |
+--------------+--------------------------------------+----------------+

# Course Overview

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-overview-table.qmd >}}

# Details

## Course Content

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-course-content.qmd >}}

## Class Format

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-class-format.qmd >}}

## Homework

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-homework.qmd >}}

## Exams

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-exams.qmd >}}

## Instructor Feedback

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-instructor-feedback.qmd >}}

## End-Quarter Course Evaluations

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-course-evaluations.qmd >}}

## Instructor E-mail Policy

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-email-policy.qmd >}}

## Texts

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-texts.qmd >}}

## Other Learning Resources

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-learning-resources.qmd >}}

## Self-Care as Students

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-self-care.qmd >}}

## Special Accommodations

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-accommodations.qmd >}}

## Academic Verification

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-academic-verification.qmd >}}

## Academic Conduct

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-academic-conduct.qmd >}}

## Territory Acknowledgement

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-territory-acknowledgement.qmd >}}

## Changes to this syllabus

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-changes.qmd >}}

# Finding Employment on Campus

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-employment-campus.qmd >}}

# Finding Employment After Graduating

{{< include _subfiles/syllabus/_sec-employment-after.qmd >}}
